name: Advance America
description_short: Hammond, IN's Advance America at 1301 E 165th Street provides fast payday and title loans for quick cash when you need it.
description_long:
The Advance America storefront at 1301 E 165th Street in Hammond, IN is a standalone location serving the East Hammond community. Open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM, this location welcomes borrowers seeking quick, accessible lending solutions. The storefront is designed for convenience and efficient service.

This Hammond location specializes in payday loans and title loans, providing fast cash to qualified borrowers throughout Hammond and surrounding areas. The staff can answer questions about loan terms, eligibility requirements, and application procedures. Contact the Hammond store directly at +1 219-933-3067 to discuss your borrowing needs and explore available loan options.

If you're in Hammond, IN and need emergency cash, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and an active checking account to speed up your application. Advance America's local team processes applications efficiently, so many borrowers receive funding the same day. The Hammond location serves residents and businesses across Lake County and northern Indiana.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Flexible loan amounts: $100–$500 payday loans, $100–$1,000 installment loans, $2,000–$25,000 title loans
Multiple application methods: online, in-store, or by phone pre-qualification
Extended store hours (10 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–4 p.m. Saturday) for working customers
High customer satisfaction: 4.9-star rating across 125,448 Google reviews
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms than payday loans, reducing immediate payment burden
cons: Website does not disclose APR, fees, or interest rates—consumers must visit in-store or call for pricing
Payday and installment loans typically carry very high annual percentage rates (often 300–500% APR) compared to traditional lending
Title loans require collateral (paid-off vehicle in borrower's name) and carry repossession risk if not repaid
Short repayment terms on payday loans (2–4 weeks) can create debt cycles if income is unstable
No mention of credit counseling, debt management alternatives, or financial education resources on the website
best_for: Consumers with sudden emergencies (car repairs, medical bills, utility shutoffs) requiring cash within 24 hours
Unbanked or underbanked customers without access to credit cards or traditional bank loans
Vehicle owners with paid-off cars who need larger amounts ($2,000–$25,000) via title loans
Customers who prefer in-person service and bilingual support for loan application
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers in genuine emergencies who need cash within 24 hours and have limited access to traditional credit. However, the primary caveat is that payday and installment loans carry very high costs (often 300–500%+ APR) and short repayment periods that can create debt cycles; these are emergency solutions only, not sustainable financial products. Consumers should explore payday alternatives (credit union PALs, employer advances, non-profit credit counseling) before committing to these high-cost loans.
services: Payday loans ($100–$500, 2–4 week terms, in-store and online)
Installment loans ($100–$1,000, multiple payment terms, in-store and online)
Title loans ($2,000–$25,000, vehicle collateral required, in partnership with LoanCenter)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 1301 E 165th St, Hammond, IN. Fast payday and title loans. Call 219-933-3067.
